text:

    lang/ruby3{1,2,3}: Fix build with POSIX-compliant `sh -c`

    This chanes nothing in the built package, so bumping PORTREVISION is not
    required.

    PR:             222872
    Reported by:    jilles
    Tested by:      John Hein
    Approved by:    meta (myself, with ruby hat)
